get.summary: SDMX published indicators codelist for a given Agency

parameters.name: Version
parameters.description: The version of the codelist (e.g. 1.3). Only 1 decimal digit is allowed

parameters.name: Agency
parameters.description: The name of the agency used to filter indicators (e.g. UNICEF). This is the agency owner of the indicator. Indicators borrowed by other agencies are not returned by this method

parameters.name: IndicatorCodelist
parameters.description: The name of the SDMX indicator codelist associated to the agency (e.g. CL_UNICEF_INDICATOR)

406.description: Input version has more than 1 decimal digit

get.summary: Support the agency / sector / domain / subdomain as an SDMX category scheme

parameters.name: Version
parameters.description: The version of the category scheme (e.g. 1.3). Only 1 decimal digit is allowed

parameters.name: Agency
parameters.description: The name of the agency used to filter domains (e.g. UNICEF). This is the agency owner of the indicator. Indicators borrowed by other agencies are not returned by this method

parameters.name: Codelist
parameters.description: The name of the codelist associated to the agency (e.g. CS_UNICEF)

406.description: Input version has more than 1 decimal digit

get.summary: SDMX Country Codelist (only published countries)

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: A decimal expressing the version of the codelist. e.g. 1.0. Only 1 decimal digit is allowed

406.description: Input version has more than 1 decimal digit

get.summary: SDMX Regions Codelist

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: A decimal expressing the version of the codelist. e.g. 1.0. Only 1 decimal digit is allowed

406.description: Input version has more than 1 decimal digit

get.summary: Get the list of all collection processes/mechanisms related to indicators

200.description: The list of all collection processes/mechanisms related to indicators. Examples are "CRAVE" and "SDG Consultation"

get.summary: Get the list of all existing and existed countries

200.description: The list of all existing and existed countries

get.summary: Get the list of all current countries

200.description: The list of all current countries

get.summary: Get the list of all organizations responsible for country names

200.description: The list of all organizations responsible for country names, e.g. UNICEF, UNSD, WB

get.summary: Get the list of all indicator/region series custodians

200.description: The list of all indicator/region series custodians

get.summary: Get the list of all indicator data sources defined in the database

200.description: The list of all indicator data sources defined in the database.

post.summary: Ask a question in natural language, in English, and get one or more data points back
More like this for answering a question in natural language, in English

parameters.name: question
parameters.description: The original question, asked before the more like this

parameters.name: locationCode
parameters.description: The code of the country or region. If null, it means the world

parameters.name: indicatorCode
parameters.description: The indicator Helix Code, e.g. DM_POP_U18

parameters.name: indicatorID
parameters.description: The Solr wildcarded ID of a data point, e.g. UNICEF|MNCH|1.0|{ASTERISK}|MNCH_MLRCARE|_T|Y0T4|_T|_T|_T|_T|{ASTERISK}|{ASTERISK}

get.summary: Get the list of all indicator classifications

200.description: The list of all indicator classifications. For example, "Is SDG Indicator", "Is SOWC", "Is Emergency indicator", etc.

get.summary: Get the list of all indicators defined in the database. It does not include all possible attubutes (use api/indicators/{ID} for the complete list of attributes of a single indicator). Without an API key, it return only published indicators.

200.description: The list of all indicators defined in the database. It doesn't include indicator attributes (only names) and related objects: use api/indicators/{id:long} or api/indicators/full/{id:long} for full details.

get.summary: Get the list of all indicators defined in the database by agency code. It does not include all possible attubutes. Use /api/countries/organizations to get the list of agencies. Without an API key, it return only published indicators.

200.description: The list of all indicators defined in the database by agency code. It doesn't include indicator attributes and related objects. Use /api/countries/organizations to get the list of agencies.

get.summary: Get the list of all indicators by strategic plan statement helix code. It does not include all possible attubutes. Use /api/strategicplan/statements/area/{SPAreaCode} to get the list of SP statements. Without an API key, it return only published indicators.

200.description: The list of all indicators by strategic plan statement helix code.

get.summary: Get an indicator given its ID. Previous versions of simple attributes are not included. For files, use the "Path" value to access the file

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the requested indicator

200.description: The requested indicator with all attributes and related objects. Previous versions of simple attributes are not included

404.description: The indicator was not found in the database

get.summary:
Get an indicator given its ID. Previous versions of simple attributes are not included
Open also for unpublished indicators

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The code of the requested indicator

200.description: The requested indicator with all attributes and related objects. Previous versions of simple attributes are not included

404.description: The indicator was not found in the database
